name: notebook-tools
description: Safe cell-aware Jupyter notebook creation, inspection, editing, and execution for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Safely create, edit, inspect, and run Jupyter notebooks.
interface.longDescription: Cell-aware notebook workflows with stable IDs, guarded revisions, atomic saves, bounded outputs, and clean-kernel execution.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Jupyter notebook and summarize its cell structure.
Edit this notebook safely using a guarded cell-aware change.
Execute this notebook from a clean kernel and verify its outputs.
